original_statement: in which venue did the vikings play after they played in mile high stadium?
mutated_statement: in which venue did the group do something after they did something in a certain place?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action verb generalization + Location generalization: "the vikings" → "the group" | "play" → "do something" | "mile high stadium" → "a certain place" (specific team→generic group | specific action→vague action | named venue→unspecified place)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique可见关键信息：judge_thought 多次明确指出“问题太模糊”“无法确定/不唯一”，critique 也指出原先步骤在没有依据下做了不当猜测。Agent 初始迭代给出具体答案“metropolitan stadium”，但在被批评后在后续迭代改为“cannot be determined”，并在链中解释因问题未明确指代哪个地点或动作所以无法选定行。行为特征是：识别到问题歧义并明确声明无法确定（没有坚持原始猜测作为最终答案），虽然没有向用户直接提出澄清问题，但表现为不给出具体答案并说明需要更多信息，因此归入“意识到目标模糊，反问用户”类别。
